title: Immigration Work Permit Services | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Immigration Work Permit Services

### Streamline the business immigration process.
Are you lost in a sea of work permit processing requirements?
Even the most straightforward immigration regimes can be difficult to understand, never mind the parameters of a multi-layered immigration scheme.
Work permit immigration processes are complex—but navigating them doesn’t have to be. Whether you’re a company or individual, we blend a personalized approach with comprehensive coverage and modern technologies to help simplify the immigration process.

### Comprehensive work permit services into over 170 countries worldwide
Whether you are running a multi-jurisdictional immigration program or need assistance in a particular country or region, Fragomen can help you seamlessly manage the movement of your workforce. We offer a full range of work permit and authorization services to help you comply with immigration regulations in more than 170 countries worldwide.
Our immigration work permit services include guidance on:
- Application preparation and filing for temporary work and residence permits, entry clearances, entry visas and other immigrant matters Visa issuance assistance Entry and departure procedures Successful security and medical clearance processing Complex cases, including advocacy before government agencies Advice on dependent and family member visa processing, ability to work matters, student-related matters and maintenance of status
- Application preparation and filing for temporary work and residence permits, entry clearances, entry visas and other immigrant matters
- Visa issuance assistance
- Entry and departure procedures
- Successful security and medical clearance processing
- Complex cases, including advocacy before government agencies
- Advice on dependent and family member visa processing, ability to work matters, student-related matters and maintenance of status

### Making the complex simple
We assign a designated team of experienced professionals to every case and every client who:
- Take the time to understand you, your business objectives and your immigration goals Break down complicated immigration processes into clear, manageable steps Communicate openly and frequently with internal stakeholders and applicants throughout the immigration process Build trusted partnerships and provide you with tailored support
- Take the time to understand you, your business objectives and your immigration goals
- Break down complicated immigration processes into clear, manageable steps
- Communicate openly and frequently with internal stakeholders and applicants throughout the immigration process
- Build trusted partnerships and provide you with tailored support
Immigration is a very personal process. If you’re the one embarking on this journey, your Fragomen team will:
- Guide you and your family through every step of the process Explain the immigration requirements of your new country in a way that is easy to understand Prepare you for your role in the immigration process Make sure you know exactly what you need to do to get you and your family to your new home as quickly as possible Keep you informed about where you are in the process—even when we’re just waiting for government responses
- Guide you and your family through every step of the process
- Explain the immigration requirements of your new country in a way that is easy to understand
- Prepare you for your role in the immigration process
- Make sure you know exactly what you need to do to get you and your family to your new home as quickly as possible
- Keep you informed about where you are in the process—even when we’re just waiting for government responses

### Personalized support for senior executives and leaders
We appreciate the unique requirements, pressures and aggressive timelines that often accompany the relocation of senior executives and their families.
Fragomen offers personalized support services to meet the specialized needs of client executives and senior management personnel. We’ll work with you to develop tailored protocols for working with your senior executives and leaders, leveraging constant communication, up-to-the-minute knowledge and resources befitting the urgency to enhance the overall experience.

### Streamlined immigration work permit management through technology
We combine personalized service delivery with advanced technology to modernize and streamline immigration program management.
Our proprietary worldwide software Fragomen Connect automates many of the steps within the immigration process. It is designed to support the needs of your human resources and mobility teams and your individual employees. The system eases the management of your immigration program through simple-to-use features and tools, including:
- 24/7/365 real-time access to your cases from anywhere in the world
- Clear milestones so you know case progress at any given moment
- Powerful dashboards with snapshots of your immigration program and statistics
- A wealth of resources including process checklists, guides and videos along with analysis on the latest immigration news and trends
Connect is exclusive to the firm and provided to our clients as part of our value-added approach .

## Explore more at Fragomen
Fragomen earned top national and regional rankings in Chambers USA 2026, including its 13th consecutive year in Band 1 nationwide.
Senior Manager Samantha Arnold examines the remaining opportunities under Ireland’s winding-down Immigrant Investor Programme and what they mean for eligible investors and their families.
Government Affairs Strategy Director Shuyeb Muquit analyses the UK’s latest net migration decline, exploring what the data reveals about policy impact, economic trade‑offs and the risks of over‑correction in future migration strategy.
Partner Bo Cooper discusses the practical considerations facing employers and foreign nationals amid recent changes to green card processing.
In this #FragomenFC episode, Partner Rick Lamanna, Senior Manager Sergio Flores and Senior Associate Jake Paul Minster discuss final travel and immigration considerations ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
Senior Manager Samantha Arnold discusses Ireland’s citizenship framework and the gaps that can remain following reforms to birthright citizenship.
In this video, Partner Diana Quintas discusses how Brazil’s family reunion visa supports long-term international assignments and outlines key eligibility, documentation and compliance considerations for employers and families relocating to Brazil.
Attorney María José Clarke explores Chile’s intensified immigration enforcement framework under President José Antonio Kast, examining new employer compliance obligations, work authorization rules for foreign nationals and the legal and financial consequences of unauthorized employment.
Senior Manager Jonathan Hill examines how the UK’s new RAG rating system and stricter compliance metrics could shape universities’ approaches to international student recruitment and sponsorship compliance.
Knowledge Management Director Ana Sofia Walsh and Senior Client Engagement Manager Soraya Driessen examine the European Commission’s EU Inc. proposal and its potential to reshape corporate structures across the EU, highlighting the resulting complexities and unresolved questions for immigration, work authorization and cross-border workforce mobility.
